subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! In the Torah and the Gospel, the divine Kingdom hath been likened unto a garden and a vineyard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان در تورات و انجیل ملکوت الهیه را به باغستان و تاکستان تشبیه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @symbolism
